summary: Comprehensive testing of dual deck DJ turntable system completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend UI components all present and functional. Minor modal overlay issue identified during station selection.

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay element blocking click interactions when modal is open
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True in playwright or keyboard shortcuts work fine

passed_tests: Radio stations API with multiple genres (hip hop, rnb, trap, soul)
Recording panel UI with start/stop controls
Deck controls with VU meters for both decks
Audio effect knobs (Volume, Bass, Treble, Echo, Reverb, Filter) for both decks
Keyboard shortcuts (A/B deck selection, help modal, space for play/pause)
Station browser opens with radio station list
Proper color coding (Deck A=cyan, Deck B=red/magenta)
Responsive cyberpunk UI design with good contrast
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay blocking issue in StationBrowser component - the overlay div intercepts pointer events preventing station selection clicks

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (station selection blocked by overlay, all other components working)
